---
title: "Pulakesh Pradhan"
listing:
  id: latest-posts
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  max-items: 6
  categories: false
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/pulakesh.jpg
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/pulakeshpradhan/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=_DhEQHEAAAAJ
    - icon: youtube
      text: YouTube
      href: https://www.youtube.com/@SpatialGeography
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:pulakesh.mid@gmail.com
---

I am a Geographer and Spatial Data Scientist specialized in GIS and Remote Sensing. Currently, I am associated with the Department of Geography at Ravenshaw University. My work focuses on developing open-source tools and leveraging Google Earth Engine for environmental monitoring and spatial analysis.

## 🎓 Education
- **Department of Geography**, Ravenshaw University
- **Focus:** GIS, Remote Sensing, Google Earth Engine

## ✨ Key Highlights
- **Resource Person:** Maharaja Sriram Chandra Bhanja Deo University (Sept. 2025)
- **Resource Person:** Centurion University (March 2025)
- **Developer:** Creator of `geeadvance`, `deepgee`, and `geeassist` Python packages.
- **YouTube Creator:** Founder of "Spatial Geography" channel (Tutorials on GEE, Python, R).

[View Full CV →](cv.qmd)

---

## 🌍 Google Earth Engine Apps
I develop interactive tools for spatial analysis:
- [Spectral Reflectance Curve](https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/spectral)
- [Phenology Signature Crop classification](https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/signature)
- [Flood Susceptibility AHP Tool](https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/floodsusceptibility)
- [Odisha Flood Map](https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/odishaflood)

## 📺 Spatial Geography (YouTube)
- **Subscribers:** 418+ | **Views:** 7,000+
- [Subscribe to Spatial Geography](https://www.youtube.com/@SpatialGeography?sub_confirmation=1)

## 📞 Contact
- **Email:** [pulakesh.mid@gmail.com](mailto:pulakesh.mid@gmail.com)
- **WhatsApp:** [+91 8617812861](https://wa.me/918617812861)

## 📌 Latest Posts

::: {#latest-posts}
:::

[View all posts →](blog.qmd)
